translateTo.description: Language to translate to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

sourceLang.description: Language to translate from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

splitSentences.description: How the translation engine should split sentences

0.description: Treat all text as a single sentence

1.description: Split text on interpunction and newlines

nonewlines.description: Split text on interpunction only, ignoring newlines

preserveFormatting.description: Whether the translation engine should respect the original formatting, even if it would usually correct some aspects

0.description: Fix punctuation at the beginning and end of sentences and fixes lower/upper caseing at the beginning

1.description: Keep text as similar as possible to the original

formality.description: How formal or informal the target text should be. May not be supported with all languages.
